metrics.name: academorix.athlete.roster.count
metrics.description: Count of athletes per (status, age_bucket). Sampled hourly. Powers roster dashboards.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.paused_total
metrics.description: Safeguarding pause frequency. Never labelled by reason — anti-discrimination compliance.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.age_group_snapshot.unresolved_total
metrics.description: Athletes whose DOB fell outside every catalog. Elevated indicates a catalog gap — investigate.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.age_group_snapshot.stale_backlog
metrics.description: Count of athletes with current_age_group_snapshot_at > 48h ago. Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.consent.expired_snapshot_total
metrics.description: Consent snapshots aged past 365 days without re-consent. Elevated indicates guardian outreach failure.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.medical.writes_total
metrics.description: Frequency of medical mutations. Never labelled by field/value — private-tier.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.medical.large_batch_total
metrics.description: Medical writes touching > 3 fields at once. Investigate outliers for compromised HR account.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.retention.pii_redactions_total
metrics.description: PurgeArchivedAthletesJob phase 1 redaction count. Baseline: ~1 per archived athlete per 90 days.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.retention.blocked_total
metrics.description: Hard-purge attempts blocked by FK RESTRICT. reason: enrollment_still_present / membership_reference / other.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Number of hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: academorix.athlete.minor_name_leakage_incidents_total
metrics.description: CRITICAL. Every increment indicates the redactor failed to strip a minor's name from a cross-tenant platform-admin response. Should stay at 0.
